purpose: Stateless HTTP REST API handler. Exposes POST /plan, POST /update, and GET /health endpoints. Parses JSON request bodies into TravelInput, delegates to validator then routing_engine, and returns the TravelOutput as a JSON HTTP response. Designed for direct consumption by the React Native useTravelPlanner hook with no transformation layer.

endpoints.description: Build a new travel plan from scratch
Incrementally update an existing plan with new or changed stops — returns Diff in TravelOutput.diff field

base.description: The current/previous plan to diff against

response.note: diff field is always non-null on success — contains added_segments, removed_segments, cost_delta, time_delta_minutes, reason

input_schema.description: JSON body parsed into TravelInput (POST /plan) or {base: TravelOutput, input: TravelInput} (POST /update)
